description: Verified news sources for Johan Lindström's daily news monitoring (Omvärldsbevakning)

sources.name: OpenAI News
sources.notes: Official OpenAI announcements: ChatGPT, GPT models, Sora, policy

sources.name: Anthropic News
sources.notes: Claude releases, safety research, policy. Community-maintained RSS feed.

sources.name: Google AI Blog
sources.notes: Gemini, Nano Banana, Google DeepMind, all Google AI products

sources.name: Google DeepMind Blog
sources.notes: Deep research, AI safety, fundamental model research

sources.name: Microsoft AI Blog
sources.notes: Copilot updates, Azure AI, Windows AI, enterprise AI

sources.name: Microsoft 365 Copilot Blog
sources.notes: Monthly What's New for M365 Copilot. Most Swedish schools use Microsoft 365.

sources.name: Apple Newsroom
sources.notes: Filter for Apple Intelligence / AI tags only

sources.name: VentureBeat AI
sources.notes: Best general AI industry coverage. Business angle, very active.

sources.name: TechCrunch AI
sources.notes: AI startups, funding, product launches

sources.name: Hugging Face Blog
sources.notes: Open-source models, research, generative AI tools

sources.name: Higgsfield AI Blog
sources.notes: AI video generation, Seedance integrations, platform updates

sources.name: Midjourney Updates
sources.notes: Official Midjourney model releases and features

sources.name: OpenArt Blog — Updates
sources.notes: Platform updates, new AI model integrations

sources.name: ByteDance Seed Blog (Seedance)
sources.notes: Seedance video model research. Infrequent — supplement with VentureBeat coverage.

digitalisering.label: Digitalisering i skolan
digitalisering.filter_note: Pedagogical use only. Filter OUT: hardware, consumer devices, specs. Filter IN: learning outcomes, teaching methods, time-saving tools, didactics.

sources.name: Edutopia
sources.notes: Gold standard for evidence-based teaching with technology. K-12 pedagogy focus.

sources.name: EdSurge
sources.notes: Nonprofit education journalism, research-to-practice angle

sources.name: Class Tech Tips
sources.notes: Practical classroom AI/tech tips for K-12 teachers. Very practitioner-focused.

sources.name: Cult of Pedagogy
sources.notes: Deep teaching craft focus, technology in pedagogy, highly respected by teachers

sources.name: THE Journal
sources.notes: K-12 technology leadership, administrator-focused. Matches Johan's audience.

sources.name: eSchool News
sources.notes: K-12 digital learning, AI in classrooms, research and policy

sources.name: ISTE
sources.notes: Global edtech standards body. Authoritative, highly credible for thought leadership.

sources.name: AI for Education
sources.notes: AI pedagogy, courses for educators, responsible AI implementation

sources.name: TeachAI
sources.notes: Coalition: Google, Khan Academy, Microsoft, ETS. Policy briefs on AI in K-12. Monitor for major reports.

sources.name: OECD Education
sources.notes: Education policy, PISA reports, digital learning research, comparative data

sources.name: The Conversation — Education
sources.notes: Academic experts writing for general audiences. Research-to-practice bridging.

sources.name: EdTech Magazine K-12
sources.notes: K-12 administrators and IT directors, AI classroom use, digital equity

sources.name: Skolverket — Nyheter
sources.notes: Viktigaste svenska officiella källan. Digitalisering, läroplaner, nationella prov.

sources.name: Regeringen — Utbildningsdepartementet
sources.notes: Statsministern och utbildningsministerns pressmeddelanden, skollagar, reformer

sources.name: Riksdagen — Utbildningsutskottet
sources.notes: Riksdagsbeslut och propositioner. Följ under aktiva reformperioder.

sources.name: Skolledaren (Sveriges Skolledare)
sources.notes: Nyheter för rektorer och skolchefer — Johans primära målgrupp. Reformer, AI i skolan.

sources.name: Finnish National Agency for Education (EDUFI/OPH)
sources.notes: Official Finnish education authority. Constant reference in Swedish education debates.

sources.name: Harno (Estonian Education and Youth Board)
sources.notes: Estonia's education agency (replaced Innove). Primary PISA overachiever reference.

sources.name: Estonian Ministry of Education
sources.notes: Policy-level complement to Harno. AI-in-education agenda, ISTP summits.

sources.name: Singapore Ministry of Education
sources.notes: Top-5 PISA. Structured, tech-integrated education. Official policy only.

sources.name: South Korea Ministry of Education
sources.notes: Major policy signals on AI education. Low update frequency — supplement with Korea Herald.

sources.name: Korea Herald — Education
sources.notes: Best daily source for Korean education news in English

sources.name: Education News Canada
sources.notes: Best aggregator for Canadian K-12 news. Quebec and Alberta top PISA performers.

sources.name: The Conversation — Canada Education
sources.notes: Research-backed Canadian education commentary from university experts

sources.name: OECD PISA and Education Policy
sources.notes: Definitive PISA data source, country comparisons, education at a glance
